subcodes.first_line: God willing, mayest thou be occupied at all times with the remembrance of God and drink from the Kawthar of divine knowledge. Cherish thou this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله در کل احیان بذکر الله مشغول باشی و از کوثر عرفان بیاشامی قدر این
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @presence of; reunion with God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @spiritual transformation
